@@ -433,7 +433,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.12.3","title":"[FNX] Compatibility subtask: migration guide and config lint safeguards","description":"Goal
Provide migration-safe user guidance and proactive config linting when enabling FNX features.

Scope
- Add migration guide with risk-tiered recommendations.
- Add config lint checks for risky mode combinations.
- Emit warnings with remediation paths.

Acceptance Criteria
- Migration docs are complete and scenario-driven.
- Config lint catches unsafe combinations before runtime.
- CLI/WASM surfaces expose migration hints where appropriate.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.654670177Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:38:38.003287945Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["config","docs","fnx","safety","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.10.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:28:53.552575666Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.12","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.654670177Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.12.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:42.298597311Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:38:38.003225357Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:42.242105061Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.12.4","title":"[FNX] Compatibility subtask: canary rollout and deterministic rollback drills","description":"Goal
Implement canary rollout + rollback automation for FNX feature enablement.

Scope
- Define phased rollout states and health criteria.
- Add automatic rollback triggers from compatibility/regression signals.
- Validate playbook with simulated failure drills.

Acceptance Criteria
- Canary and rollback commands are documented and tested.
- Failure drills demonstrate deterministic rollback behavior.
- Rollout status is observable in structured logs/evidence bundles.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.718858158Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:28:55.876596951Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fnx","ops","reliability","rollout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.10.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:42.417732637Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.11.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:42.476988616Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.12","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.718858158Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.12.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:42.356457074Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.12.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:28:55.871678043Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.2","title":"[FNX] Implement Mermaid IR -> fnx graph adapter layer","description":"Goal
Build a robust adapter between MermaidDiagramIr and fnx graph structures.

Background
Integration quality depends on lossless, deterministic mapping of nodes/edges/clusters and stable IDs. Without this, all downstream algorithmic improvements are suspect.

Scope
- Implement adapter module that converts IR to fnx-ready graph representation.
- Preserve stable node/edge identity, directionality markers, and essential attributes.
- Provide explicit undirected projection utilities for algorithms that require Graph.
- Add round-trip integrity tests for mapping invariants.

Acceptance Criteria
- Adapter is deterministic across repeated runs.
- Identity and attribute mapping tests cover edge cases (self-loops, parallel edges, cluster-contained nodes).
- Conversion overhead is benchmarked and acceptable for target corpus.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:36.054535794Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:23:24.299268078Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adapter","fm-core","fnx"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:36.054535794Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:37.381531405Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:11.295501972Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:11.359138280Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-ml2r.2.1","title":"[FNX] Adapter subtask: stable ID and metadata projection","description":"Goal
Guarantee identity fidelity between fm-core IR entities and fnx graph nodes/edges.

Scope
- Create stable ID projection table and reverse lookup.
- Preserve edge metadata needed by layout/routing decisions.
- Add tests for deterministic ordering under hash-map insertion perturbations.

Acceptance Criteria
- 100% deterministic mapping in repeated randomized insertion tests.
- No ID collisions across nodes/clusters/virtual nodes.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

 {"id":"bd-ml2r.2.2","title":"[FNX] Adapter subtask: directed/undirected projection policy","description":"Goal
Define directed-to-undirected projection policy for using current fnx Graph-centric algorithms safely.

Scope
- Implement explicit projection modes (ignore direction, bidirectional expansion, weighted penalties).
- Document which diagnostics/layout decisions are valid under each mode.
- Ensure projection choice is surfaced in traces and diagnostics.

Acceptance Criteria
- Projection mode is configurable and deterministic.
- Tests verify that projection policy does not silently alter declared semantics.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

 {"id":"bd-ml2r.3","title":"[FNX] Add parser and CLI structural diagnostics via fnx","description":"Goal
Add fnx-powered structural diagnostics to parser and CLI validation paths.

Scope
- After parse, compute structural analyses: connected components, articulation points, bridges, cycle basis.
- Emit diagnostics with severity levels and remediation suggestions.
- Integrate into `fm-cli validate` (human + JSON output).

Acceptance Criteria
- Diagnostics appear deterministically and include concrete node/edge context.
- Parser still degrades gracefully on malformed input.
- CLI output schema extended with backwards-compatible additive fields.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

 {"id":"bd-ml2r.3.1","title":"[FNX] Diagnostics subtask: parser-side analysis and codes","description":"Goal
Implement structural analyzers and diagnostic synthesis in parser pipeline.

Scope
- Run fnx analyses from parsed IR graph view.
- Map findings to diagnostic records with spans where possible.
- Add unit tests for representative motifs: disconnected islands, articulation choke points, fragile bridges, dense cycles.

Acceptance Criteria
- Analyzer outputs are deterministic and tested.
- Diagnostics include machine-readable codes and stable wording contract.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
